title: The Walking Deceased
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c6a724ada6c2a1aa05321425e51ab997506ca9.png)

This **The Walking Dead** inspired modpack includes over 70 mods
focusing on performance and survival-style gameplay.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mod Highlights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da3975620bf0e1d89bdcaedcc6084c8e76adb476.png)

- TaCZ
- The Hordes
- First Aid
- Cold Sweat
- Thirst Was Taken
- Farmer's Delight
- Supplementaries
- Simple Voice Chat+Walkie-Talkie
- Serene Seasons
- Enhanced AI
- ...and more!

</details>


## **Survive!**
You're thrown into the **harsh** _post-apocalyptic_ world of **The Walking Deceased** and you have to fend for yourself. Make sure to keep track of your _health, body temperature, thirst, hunger_ and the _current season_, as it affects the growth of your _crops_ and your _temperature_.

## **GUNS!**
You'll need something to defend yourself from the _hordes_ of **zombies**, so you'll be able to use the new **Gun Smith Table** to craft guns from the TaCZ mod!

By killing mobs and mining you'll earn skill points that you can invest into buffs like movement speed, attack damage and regeneration!

## **Fight!**
_Hordes_ of **zombies** will spawn every _couple of nights_, so be careful and make sure to _protect_ your base as they can **mine** and **build** over walls. If they bite you, you *will* get infected, so make sure to keep a _golden apple_ handy. If playing on **multiplayer**, or just by **yourself**, you can use *traps* to protect your base as well.

_P.S. You only have **3 lives**. Make them count._
